subject: Trump's first 24 hours (fight back!)

body:

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: DNC Membership
subject: The fight starts now!
body:

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0c6/4067b0a/23d2e26c5/7e78b354/267655559/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170122_dnc_nd&source=em_20170122_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0c6/4067b0a/23d2e26c5/7e78b355/267655559/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170122_dnc_nd&source=em_20170122_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0c6/4067b0a/23d2e26c5/7e78b352/267655559/VEsHAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170122_dnc_nd&source=em_20170122_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0c6/4067b0a/23d2e26c5/7e78b353/267655559/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170122_dnc_nd&source=em_20170122_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: John Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
I started the week by traveling to Atlanta on Monday to speak at
The King Center about the importance of strengthening our
communities.

Peter, I started the week by traveling to Atlanta on Monday to
speak at The King Center about the importance of strengthening
our communities. If you'd like to, you can view my remarks
(here).

At the invitation of the House
and Senate, I traveled to D.C. on Thursday to participate in
roundtable discussions on how to repeal and replace Obamacare. I
also penned an op-ed in TIME about healthcare. Read it here.

During my visit, I had the
opportunity to meet with my friend, Sen. John McCain to talk
about national security issues and my growing concerns about the
future of international alliances that have long ensured the
United States and its partner nations of a stable world and the
free flow of ideas and trade.

Sen. McCain also invited me to
join him as part of the American delegation to the Munich
Security Conference on Feb. 13th. I look forward to having the
opportunity to continue stressing the importance of our strategic
alliances as I recently did in this TIME op-ed.

As part of the inaugural
activities, I enjoyed participating in an Ohio Reception, along
with many of our elected Republican leaders and party supporters.

I was honored to attend the
Inauguration on Friday morning and witness another peaceful
transition of power - a hallmark in American democracy. Thank you
for the fun conversation, Governors Malloy and Baker!

Many of you have heard stories
about "fake news" since the election and I just wanted to share
with you that I think it insults Americans, is a disservice to
serious journalism and poisons our democracy. Here is a recent
example that should disturb all Americans.

In my opinion, we should all
strive to be honest with each other and accept some personal
responsibility in believing everything we see online these days.

Finally, I look forward to
sharing details about my upcoming state budget in the weeks ahead
to keep Ohio on strong financial footing, drive areas critical to
job creation and embrace the future of technology.

Thank you for your ongoing
support and interest!

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/is6g7MYlTN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/os6g7MYlTN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-41361907598-echo3-8248EBBCF93DAEB713CBC9CB23E67893@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: TURNING POINT ALERT (via DSCC)
subject: Obama: "I have just been your front man"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Millions are marching from coast-to-coast to protest Donald Trump's presidency and stand up for equality. And we're about to make our biggest grassroots statement yet... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-TurningPointDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- Shortly after Donald Trump's swearing-in, President Obama left us with a few final words before departing Washington:
"Michelle and I have just been your front man and woman...the face and the voice out front on the TV screen or on the microphone.

**But this has never been about us. _It 's been about you._**" Millions came out in force yesterday to prove just that -- rallying in women's marches from coast-to-coast to stand up for equality and protest Donald Trump's presidency.

**The message clear, loud, and a simple call to action: We show up. We fight back.**

[**And we 're on the brink of making another huge statement, Friend. We're just $32,794 away from hitting our $150,000 grassroots goal in the first 72 hours of Trump's presidency. With every $1 closing the gap fast, can we count on you to chip in right away?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-TurningPointDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The new administration needs to see, along with people in the streets, that Democrats are organizing to protect our progress.

**That 's how we pick up the mantle from President Obama after all he's done for us. That's how we make it known any attempt to undermine our democracy won't last.**

[**Friend, will you chip in and empower our movement against Trump? Your immediate support is crucial to hitting our $150,000 goal and pushing back in the first moments of his presidency >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-TurningPointDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed80/2b07114c/4724e964/7369abf7/3775851095/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed80/2b07114c/4724e964/7369abf6/3775851095/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed80/2b07114c/4724e964/7369abf1/3775851095/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: Millions are marching from coast-to-coast to protest Donald Trump's presidency and stand up for equality. And we're about to make our biggest grassroots statement yet... "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Friend -- Shortly after Donald Trump's swearing-in, President Obama left us with a few final words before departing Washington: "Michelle and I have just been your front man and woman...the face and the voice out front on the TV screen or on the microphone. But this has never been about us. It 's been about you." Millions came out in force yesterday to prove just that -- rallying in women's marches from coast-to-coast to stand up for equality and protest Donald Trump's presidency. The message clear, loud, and a simple call to action: We show up. We fight back. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" The new administration needs to see, along with people in the streets, that Democrats are organizing to protect our progress. That 's how we pick up the mantle from President Obama after all he's done for us. That's how we make it known any attempt to undermine our democracy won't last. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Thanks, Team DSCC Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
